name: Affin Holdings Bhd
summary: Affin Holdings Bhd is a Malaysia-based financial services group that provides banking, insurance, and investment services. The company operates through its subsidiaries, which include Affin Bank Berhad, Affin Hwang Investment Bank Berhad, and Affin Islamic Bank Berhad. Affin Holdings is headquartered in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia.
